# OSHA Compliance MCP Server

AI-native API for OSHA safety regulation lookups. 479 standards with plain-English summaries, real common violations, and proper citation formatting — built for agents.

**Free tier:** 3 lookups/day per IP (no auth required)
**Paid tier:** $0.01/call via x402 on Base L2
**Wallet:** 0x0b55C77eDC2592e38eBd008F82Cce694d3c49475
**Standards:** 479 (188 General Industry + 291 Construction)
**Data:** Last updated 2026-03-31. Penalty data current as of 2026-01-15.

## Endpoint

```
POST https://osha-mcp.vercel.app/api/lookup
GET  https://osha-mcp.vercel.app/api/lookup   (info + quota status)
```

## Free Tier

Send any POST request without an x402 header. You get 3 free lookups per IP per day. No registration required. When your free quota is exhausted, add an x402 payment header to continue.

## Authentication

**Free (3/day):** No authentication needed.
**Paid:** Include `x402-payment: <signature>` header. Learn more at https://pay.chipper.xyz

## Tools

### lookup_standard
Search OSHA standards by topic, keyword, hazard, or exact standard number.

Examples:
- query: "fall protection for roofing work"
- query: "respiratory protection in manufacturing"
- query: "1926.501" (exact standard lookup)
- query: "confined space entry requirements"
- query: "welding fumes and ventilation"

Response includes: standard_number, title, subpart, scope, plain_summary, key_requirements, ppe_requirements, common_violations, ecfr_url.

### format_citation
Format a standard number into proper legal citation format.

Examples:
- standard_number: "1926.501"
- standard_number: "1910.134"

Returns: { formatted, short, full, url }

### get_ppe_requirements
Get required PPE for a specific task or hazard.

Examples:
- task: "overhead welding"
- task: "trenching 6 feet deep"
- task: "spray painting in enclosed space"

### get_penalty_info
Current OSHA penalty amounts by violation type.

Violation types: serious, other_than_serious, willful, repeat, failure_to_abate, posting_requirements, all.

### check_applicability
Determine which OSHA standards apply to an industry or task.

Examples:
- task: "scaffolding over 6 feet"
- industry: "commercial construction"
- naics_code: "236220"

### get_standard_text
Get full regulatory text + summary for a specific standard.

Examples:
- standard_number: "1910.134"
- standard_number: "1926.501"

## Coverage

- 29 CFR 1910 (General Industry): 188 standards
- 29 CFR 1926 (Construction): 291 standards
- Common violations: Based on OSHA enforcement data
- Full text + plain-English summaries for all standards

## Example Request

```json
POST https://osha-mcp.vercel.app/api/lookup
{
  "tool": "lookup_standard",
  "query": "welding respiratory protection"
}
```

## Disclaimer

AI-generated summaries are for reference only and do not constitute legal advice. Verify requirements with official OSHA sources at osha.gov. Standards may have been amended since last update.
